description: COPY --parents nested conflicts preserve the existing file and publish no failed result

transitions.name: nested-conflict-fails-without-publication

writes.Dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.20
FROM base
RUN mkdir /dest && printf old >/dest/secret
COPY --parents secret/value /dest

transitions.spore_diagnostic: spore build: Dockerfile line 4: instruction failed: COPY --parents secret/value /dest

writes.Dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.20
FROM base
RUN mkdir /dest && printf old >/dest/secret
RUN test "$(cat /dest/secret)" = old && mkdir -p /oracle && printf recovery >/oracle/result
